step_rationale: Plasmalogen species predicts MI; reflects lipid remodeling in atherogenic lipoproteins.
mechanism: Acyl-alkyl (plasmalogen) phosphatidylcholine composition independently predicts MI risk via altered lipoprotein biology.

references.title: Serum metabolites and risk of myocardial infarction and ischemic stroke: a targeted metabolomic approach in two German prospective cohorts.
